## LiveVault PR checklist

- [ ] Scope matches approved feature
- [ ] State document reviewed/updated; durable decision logged if needed
- [ ] Build state refreshed
- [ ] Version/cache changed exactly once when required and match
- [ ] Existing and new tests pass
- [ ] Desktop/mobile QA reviewed; PWA QA considered
- [ ] Production data unchanged; no secrets/provider calls/workflows
- [ ] Preview uses synthetic data; device checks are identified
- [ ] No merge or deployment performed
